blocked_interpretation: baseline is proven robust or production-ready
notes: This uses baseline training report internal split diagnostics only.

allowed_interpretation: baseline validation report is lower than training diagnostic
blocked_interpretation: baseline failed or should be replaced
notes: Different validation report context; do not treat as direct model-selection evidence.

allowed_interpretation: v1 repeats technical-only diagnostics with small internal gap
blocked_interpretation: v1 is proven robust or production-ready
notes: No external features were used; still paper-only.

allowed_interpretation: ML v2 fixed-spec is runnable but has overfit risk and small validation sample
blocked_interpretation: ML v2 is superior, robust, or production-ready
notes: Gap is materially larger than baseline/v1 internal split gap, but validation sample is only 20 rows.

allowed_interpretation: Proceed only to pre-registered robustness gate/design; keep no-winner status
blocked_interpretation: promote, tune, select, rerun OOS, or change strategy
notes: Primary risk is not immediate model-selection overfit; it is small-sample and repeated-process overfit risk.
